title: microsorum ensatum
intro: Microsorum ensatum, also known as Polypodium ensatum or Chinese polypody, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and promoting digestion. In herbal preparations, Microsorum ensatum is often dried and processed into teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use.
